scripts.build: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' node -e "import { access } from 'node:fs/promises'; import { resolveDesktopContentSource } from './src/url.ts'; const source = resolveDesktopContentSource({ mode: 'production' }); if (source.kind !== 'file') throw new Error('Expected a file-based desktop renderer entrypoint in production.'); await access(source.filePath);" && node ./scripts/build.mjs && node ../../scripts/validate-foundation-app.mjs build
scripts.package:mac: node ./scripts/generate-icons.mjs && pnpm --filter @loomic/web build && pnpm build && node ./scripts/package.mjs
